title: bag #(...) (petri store, monotone ops)
manager: A multiset — a bag `#(a a b)` that counts multiplicity — with monotone operations, which is exactly the store a Petri-net-style machine needs: tokens accumulate and are consumed, and the monotone discipline keeps the reasoning tractable. This is the data structure behind the whole resource-counting class of machines, where "how many of each" is the state that matters.
cs: bag/multiset + `#( )` literal; multiplicity counts; monotone ops (petri store); value equality; container protocol (W6.43).
